changes.reason: Activate exactly one dormant valid-0DTE pin-avoid concept as an attribution split while preserving all existing valid-0DTE profiles. This follows the strategist's new-regime router split thesis and avoids disabling the profitable charm_pin_pullback_long and charm_wall_breakaway_long baselines.
Enable the dormant pin-avoid profile for a clean config-only discovery run. Its only exposed tunable is enabled, so this is an attribution probe rather than a tuned promotion candidate.

recommendation.expected_effect: This should reveal whether existing charm-wall/pin-avoid playbook logic can intercept or separately attribute the high-MAE charm/pin sub-regime without changing the profitable parent profiles. Success is not just higher score; require standalone positive or risk-reducing pin-avoid attribution, total net profit >=98% of run_029, protected fast-winner retention >=95%, slow_12h still 0, and no damage to VALID_0DTE pullback/charm-wall PnL. Main tradeoff is router cannibalization if the dormant profile steals clean charm-pin or charm-wall winners without reducing worst MAE.
recommendation.label: promote
recommendation.rationale: The leader is plateaued and the recent repeated charm-wall geometry recommendation was rejected as a duplicate. Direct 1DTE tightening, no-0DTE compression, and call-wall loosening have already hurt or gone flat, while broad extended-VWAP filters risk cutting protected winners. The next clean experiment is a new-regime router attribution test: activate one dormant pin-avoid concept and leave existing profitable profiles intact. This is not a stop-loss, not global tightening, and not another cumulative veto pass.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1261.5 over 34 trades but owns the global worst MAE at -513.4. charm_wall_breakaway_long adds $985.6 from only 5 trades with high convexity. The worst tails cluster around charm/pin/high-extension contexts, while static local extension-box edits were flat and broad filters overlap protected fast winners.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Dormant Split Probe
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The dormant profile may cannibalize profitable charm-pin or charm-wall entries without reducing global worst MAE, or it may be unreachable and produce no attribution.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE pin/charm-wall context where current charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long logic admits high-extension pullback or breakaway entries with pin-avoid characteristics.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or reduces combined charm/pin worst MAE while total net profit remains >=98% of run_029, protected fast-winner retention remains >=95%, and slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: The worst charm-pin tail reached meaningful profit only after a long adverse path, while protected extended-VWAP winners resolve quickly. Static config edits have not separated this cleanly.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Can overfit a small tail sample or block clean high-extension winners unless validated against protected fast-winner UTCs.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entry that fails to make early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98%, and slow_12h remains 0.
